final_response: Holding the send. The 2026-04-21 daybook handoff has an explicit guardrail: don't email the vendor with the revised numbers until legal clears the revised indemnification clause, because sending the numbers implies acceptance. The legal-review followup is still open in followups.md and hasn't moved in ~26 days, and the tmp/ email draft is no longer present. Before I send, can you confirm legal has signed off on the indemnification redline (and share any redlines to fold into the draft)? If you want to override the guardrail knowing the indemnification exposure, say so explicitly and I'll log it as a decision and send. I've opened today's daybook and updated the followup.
